
[source layer]
  (D-series)
    [review] UF-D1 main.tex — editMode option present in \documentclass (required: editMode removed before submission)
      fix: Remove `editMode` from the \documentclass options before submitting.
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-d1--editmode-option-not-left-on-for-submission

Summary: 0 must-fix, 1 review.
